name: @swps/nockster-js
description: TypeScript library for communicating with Nockster hardware wallet

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('src/types.d.ts','dist/types.d.ts'); const index='dist/index.d.ts'; const ref='/// <reference path=\"./types.d.ts\" />\\n'; const content=fs.readFileSync(index,'utf8'); if (!content.startsWith(ref)) fs.writeFileSync(index, ref + content);"
